items.title: Resideo Announces Completion of Transaction with Honeywell To Accelerate Payment of All Potential Monetary Obligations Under Indemnification and Reimbursement Agreement
items.description: Resideo Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: REZI), a leading global manufacturer, developer, and distributor of technology-driven sensing and controls products and solutions for residential and commercial end-markets, today announced that it has completed the previously announced transaction with Honeywell International Inc. items.title: Parks Associates Forecasts the Market for Smart Thermostats Will Reach Unit Sales of 8.1 million in 2030, with Annual Revenues Exceeding $1.1 billion
items.description: Parks Associates' latest market assessment, Smart Thermostat Market Assessment 2025, forecasts that smart thermostat sales will grow over the next five years. In 2030, the US market for smart thermostats is projected to achieve sales of 8.1 million units, with annual revenues exceeding $1.1 billion. Current adoption of current smart thermostats is 16-17% of US internet households, and the top smart thermostat brands purchased in the last year are Google Nest and Honeywell Home.
